title: FLOSS Weekly 393: Bitergia
summary:
Founded by FLOSS (free, libre, open source software) enthusiasts with a large experience in development, research and consultancy activities, Bitergia is a company born from +15 years experience in URJC GSyC/Libresoft group on collaborative software development methodologies and quality models research.

Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly<… href="http://bit.ly/flossweeklyguests" target="_blank">Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.

Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com

Thanks to Cachefly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
